name: Healing Smoothie
recipeInstructions:
1. Push the kiwi fruit and cantaloupe through a juicer or food processor.
2. Place the juice and banana in a blender or food processor and blend until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a tall glass and drink immediately. Enjoy!
This is a great drink for anyone, especially those with ulcers. This drink has soothing qualities which protect and heal the stomach lining.
